svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron" agent="heddle-docs"> <diagram name="data-flow" id="data-flow"> <mxGraphModel dx="-544" dy="-117" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1100" pageHeight="500" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=18;fontStyle=1;align=center;" value="Heddle Pipeline Data Flow" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="300" x="350" y="10" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="input" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;" value="Input
(text, file, object)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="130" x="40" y="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="config" parent="1" style="shape=note;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;backgroundOutline=1;size=15;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;" value="Pipeline YAML
steps, model tiers,
silo rules" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="130" x="40" y="250" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="step1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=11;" value="Step 1: Worker A
(e.g. Extractor)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="140" x="240" y="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cp1" parent="1" style="shape=parallelogram;perimeter=parallelogramPerimeter;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontColor=#333333;fontSize=10;" value="Checkpoint" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="100" x="260" y="210" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="step2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=11;" value="Step 2: Worker B
(e.g. Analyzer)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="140" x="450" y="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cp2" parent="1" style="shape=parallelogram;perimeter=parallelogramPerimeter;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontColor=#333333;fontSize=10;" value="Checkpoint" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="100" x="470" y="210" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="step3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=11;" value="Step 3: Worker C
(e.g. Validator)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="140" x="660" y="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="output" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;" value="Output
(structured result)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="130" x="870" y="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="silo-box" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=none;strokeColor=#b85450;strokeWidth=2;dashed=1;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="180" x="640" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="silo-label" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=10;fontStyle=2;align=center;fontColor=#b85450;" value="Knowledge Silo
(restricted context)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="140" x="660" y="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="llm" parent="1" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;boundedLbl=1;backgroundOutline=1;size=10;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;" value="LLM Backend
Anthropic / Ollama" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="120" x="470" y="320" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" edge="1" parent="1" source="input" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;" target="step1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2" edge="1" parent="1" source="step1" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;" target="step2"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e3" edge="1" parent="1" source="step2" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;" target="step3"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e4" edge="1" parent="1" source="step3" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;" target="output"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e-cp1" edge="1" parent="1" source="step1" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;dashed=1;strokeColor=#999999;" target="cp1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e-cp2" edge="1" parent="1" source="step2" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;dashed=1;strokeColor=#999999;" target="cp2"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e-config" edge="1" parent="1" source="config" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;dashed=1;strokeColor=#d6b656;" target="step1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e-llm1" edge="1" parent="1" source="step1" style="endArrow=classic;startArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;dashed=1;strokeColor=#9673a6;" target="llm"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e-llm2" edge="1" parent="1" source="step2" style="endArrow=classic;startArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;dashed=1;strokeColor=#9673a6;" target="llm"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e-llm3" edge="1" parent="1" source="step3" style="endArrow=classic;startArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;dashed=1;strokeColor=#9673a6;" target="llm"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
